info.name: Flashcards
info.summary: Spaced repetition flashcards for language learning — powered by Markdown files
info.description:
# Nextcloud Flashcards v2
A file-based spaced repetition flashcard app for Nextcloud.
## Key Principle **Your .md files are the single source of truth.** Cards, translations, and SR metadata all live in standard Obsidian Spaced Repetition format Markdown files stored in your Nextcloud Files.
## Features - **File-based storage** — cards stored in .md files, compatible with Obsidian SR - **SM-2 algorithm** — intelligent review scheduling written back to .md files - **Card formats** — Basic (word:::translation), Cloze (==word==^[hint]), transcriptions - **Auto-save** — changes buffered in memory, saved to .md every 10 seconds - **Text-to-Speech** — Edge TTS + Web Speech API fallback - **Study statistics** — computed from SR metadata in your files - **Git conflict resolution** — auto-resolves merge conflicts in SR tags - **Dark/light theme** — follows Nextcloud theme - **Keyboard shortcuts** — Space to reveal, 1-5 to rate - **Multilingual** — English, Russian, Serbian
info.author: Nextcloud Flashcards
